recommendations.title: When the Bough Breaks
recommendations.overview: A surrogate mother harbors a deadly secret desire for a family of her own with the husband who is expecting to raise her child.

recommendations.title: Out of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple and their daughter moves to Colombia to take over a family manufacturing plant, only to realize their new home is haunted.

recommendations.title: Kitchen with Apartment
recommendations.overview: Jacques and Martine, an ordinary bourgeois couple, invite to dinner a friend whom they have not seen the last ten years. Since then he has become a media star and everything has to go just right at dinner.

recommendations.title: Rope
recommendations.overview: Two young men attempt to prove they committed the perfect murder by hosting a dinner party for the family of a classmate they just strangled to death.

recommendations.title: Beetlejuice
recommendations.overview: A newly dead New England couple seeks help from a deranged demon exorcist to scare an affluent New York family out of their home.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A young couple purchase their new home to start a life together, only to find out the elderly couple next door have other plans for them.

recommendations.title: Rosemary's Baby
recommendations.overview: A young couple, Rosemary and Guy, moves into an infamous New York apartment building, known by frightening legends and mysterious events, with the purpose of starting a family.

recommendations.title: All My Friends Are Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of friends at a New Year’s Eve party go through a whirlwind of events that exposes secrets, breaks hearts — and leads to a shocking outcome.

recommendations.title: Abandoned
recommendations.overview: After a young couple moves into a remote farmhouse with their infant son, the woman's struggles with postpartum psychosis begin to intensify... as the house reveals secrets of its own.

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: A madly-in-love young couple's relationship begins to suffer when they struggle to conceive a child.
